response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level software engineer with a strong, diverse technical background. His most recent role shows direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol, which are highly relevant and specific to this position. However, his resume completely lacks any mention of Python, a primary required language, and his explicit AI experience appears to be very recent, falling well short of the 8-year requirement. An interview would be necessary to determine if his recent, specialized experience and strong engineering fundamentals can overcome the significant gaps in core qualifications.
strengths: Direct, recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Extensive background as a Staff Engineer with strong cloud (AWS) and DevOps (Kubernetes, CI/CD) skills.
Demonstrates initiative and leadership through founding a project, giving talks, and mentoring.
concerns: No mention of Python, which is a primary required language for the role.
Falls significantly short of the "8+ years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions" requirement.
Lacks explicit mention of experience with vector databases or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
